title: lilium scabrum
intro: Lilium scabrum, also known as the spotted lily or scabby lily, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the lily family (Liliaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lilium scabrum include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its roots and rhizomes are often used in traditional medicine preparations.
